calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Establishing Trust'S Claim Of Ownership Of Property And For Authorizing And Direc
Off Calendar Jan-21-2025 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Establishing Trust'S Claim Of Ownership Of Property And For Authorizing And Direc
Off Calendar Nov-26-2024 Continued To Jan-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard:
PES-23-306184, The Estate of Lionel West; and
PTR-24-307258, The Lionel West Trust Established September 16, 2014

Appearances:
Steven A. Swartz for Terrellynn West Taylor, Petitioner.

The court inquired whether Marrillynn waived the notice requirement for the amended petition. Mr. Swartz stated that he was unable to obtain a waiver due to lack of response from Marrillynn. The court orders the estate petitions in PES-23-306184 off calendar, and continues the trust petition to January 21, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow proper notice to be served.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Order Establishing Trust'S Claim Of Ownership Of Property And For Authorizing And Direc
Off Calendar Sep-24-2024 Continued To Nov-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Establishing Trust'S Claim Of Ownership Of Property And For Authorizing And Direc
Off Calendar Jul-30-2024 Continued To Sep-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: Estate of Lionel West PES-23-306184 and
PTR-24-307258 The Lionel West Trust.

Appearances: Steven Swarz appeared by zoom for petitioner.

Mr. Swarz stated that the only reason he wants to keep the estate petition on calendar is to get the trust petition granted, and then he will take it off calendar. Mr. Swarz also stated that if the trust matter is not granted, he will proceed in the estate matter and addressed the issue of venue. The Petitions for Order Establishing Trust's Claim of Ownership of Property and for Authorizing and Directing Transfer to Terrellynn West-Taylor, etc. (2), and the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary are continued to September 24, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Swarz is to file the declaration from his client regarding venue.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition For Order Establishing Trust'S Claim Of Ownership Of Property And For Authorizing And Directing Transfer To Terrellyn West-Taylor, Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-12-2024 Continued To Jul-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
